page_metadata.biotools__summary: This tool identifies signature genes or genes that are unique to a taxonomic clade and thus useful in phylogenetic analysis. Users input a set of query sequences and returned is a list of taxonomic clades that share signatures with the query.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This tool identifies signature genes or genes that are unique to a taxonomic clade and thus useful in phylogenetic analysis. Users input a set of query sequences and returned is a list of taxonomic clades that share signatures with the query.
